subcodes.title: Words to Percy Woodcock in 1909
subcodes.first_line: If we wish to pray we must have some object upon which to concentrate. If we turn to God
subcodes.subjects: @Manifestation of God as mediator, @knowledge; recognition of God, @Manifestation of God as sun, @the state of prayer; dynamics of prayer, @Manifestation of God as mirror, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @God as personal vs. impersonal reality, @station of the Manifestation of God
